meaning: 耶烈万[亚美尼亚共和国首都](即埃里温)
examples: All the main sightseeings of Armenia are situated near Yerevan - one of the most ancient cities in the world.
It's only 20 miles (36 kilometers) from the capital of Yerevan, home to one-third of the nation's population.
Television pictures showed reporters at a news agency in the capital Yerevan staring glumly at blank screens.
Karg was helping to lead a group of university students studying in Yerevan, Armenia.
Vehicles driving into Yerevan have been forced back, for fear they might carry demonstrators.
